# truenas_dataset (Resource)

Manages a FILESYSTEM-type ZFS dataset on TrueNAS SCALE. VOLUME-type datasets (zvols) are out of scope; encountering one is a clear, actionable error.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "truenas_dataset" "example" {
  path        = "tank/projects/myapp"
  comments    = "Storage for myapp"
  compression = "LZ4"
  atime       = "OFF"
  quota       = 107374182400 # 100 GiB

  # Refuse to destroy this dataset, even via `terraform destroy` or a
  # `path`-triggered replacement. Flip to `false` and apply before removing it.
  prevent_deletion = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Full ZFS path of the dataset, including pool name (e.g. `tank/projects/child`). Changing this forces recreation.

### Optional

- `atime` (String) Whether file access times are updated when files are accessed (`ON`, `OFF`, `INHERIT`).
- `comments` (String) Comments or description for the dataset.
- `compression` (String) Compression algorithm to use for the dataset (e.g. `LZ4`, `ZSTD`, `OFF`, `INHERIT`).
- `copies` (Number) Number of copies of data blocks to maintain for redundancy.
- `deduplication` (String) Deduplication setting for the dataset (`ON`, `OFF`, `VERIFY`, `INHERIT`).
- `exec` (String) Whether files in this dataset can be executed (`ON`, `OFF`, `INHERIT`).
- `prevent_deletion` (Boolean) When `true`, `Delete` refuses to destroy the dataset — including when destruction is triggered by a `path` change forcing replacement. Defaults to `false`. To destroy a protected dataset, first apply with this set to `false`.
- `quota` (Number) Maximum disk space this dataset and its children can consume, in bytes. `0` means no quota.
- `readonly` (String) Whether the dataset is read-only (`ON`, `OFF`, `INHERIT`).
- `record_size` (String) Suggested block size for files in the dataset (e.g. `128K`, `1M`, `INHERIT`).
- `refquota` (Number) Maximum disk space this dataset itself can consume, in bytes. `0` means no quota.
- `refreservation` (Number) Minimum disk space guaranteed to this dataset itself, in bytes. `0` means none.
- `reservation` (Number) Minimum disk space guaranteed to this dataset and its children, in bytes. `0` means none.
- `snap_dir` (String) Controls visibility of the `.zfs/snapshot` directory (`VISIBLE`, `HIDDEN`, `INHERIT`).
- `sync` (String) Synchronous write behavior (`STANDARD`, `ALWAYS`, `DISABLED`, `INHERIT`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Mirrors `path`; the dataset's sole identity.
- `name` (String) Last segment of `path`. Derived, read-only.
- `pool` (String) Pool name — the first segment of `path`. Derived, read-only.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a FILESYSTEM dataset using its full ZFS path
terraform import truenas_dataset.example tank/projects/myapp
```
